title: Creamy Comforting Venezuelan Fenugreek Casserole
description: A fresh and molten Venezuelan dish featuring fenugreek, this casserole is a perfect hangover cure, wood-fired-baked to perfection and macrobiotic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Chop the onion and mince the garlic.
Sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil until softened.
Add the fenugreek leaves and cook until wilted.
Boil the sweet potatoes until tender, then mash.
In a separate saucepan, heat the coconut milk over low heat.
Add the nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper to the coconut milk and stir until combined.
In a large bowl, combine the sautéed onion and garlic, wilted fenugreek, mashed sweet potatoes, and coconut milk mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes.
